signal_title: Spain's Draft Organic Law for the Protection of Minors in Digital Environments
risk_rationale: The draft bill introduces new requirements for parental controls, age verification, and prohibition of loot boxes for minors, which are not fully aligned with TikTok's current baseline policies. These gaps could lead to significant compliance challenges in the EU market if not addressed promptly.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Parent can view teen follower/following context and blocked-account settings.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline allows parental visibility but does not mandate parental controls by default.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Personalized ads are not allowed for under-18 users.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Prohibition of loot boxes for minors.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline does not address loot boxes, which are a form of digital content that could be considered gambling.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Detection and prevention using machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline uses estimation techniques but does not include explicit age verification systems.

remediations.title: Implement Default Parental Controls
remediations.description: Develop and implement a system where parental controls are enabled by default for all minor accounts in the EU.
acceptance_criteria: Parental controls are enabled by default for all minor accounts
Parents can manage these controls through the app

remediations.title: Prohibit Loot Boxes for Minors
remediations.description: Update content policies to explicitly prohibit loot boxes for users under 18 in the EU.
acceptance_criteria: Loot boxes are not accessible to users under 18
Compliance with EU regulations on digital content for minors

remediations.title: Implement Age Verification Systems
remediations.description: Introduce robust age verification systems to ensure compliance with the new regulatory requirements in Spain.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification is required for all new accounts
Existing accounts are verified for age compliance

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new regulations could result in fines and restrictions on TikTok's operations in Spain, impacting user growth and revenue in the EU market.
recommended_actions: Initiate a cross-functional task force to address compliance gaps.
Engage with Spanish regulators to clarify requirements and timelines.
Develop a communication plan to inform users and stakeholders of upcoming changes.
